name: Generate Empirical SNR Map for Morphological Thresholding
description: Convert the raw galaxy FITS image (~/AstroImages/snr_analysis/uit_galaxy_sample.fits) into a 32-bit SNR map where pixel values represent their standard deviations above the sky background. Measure the total pixel area of the galaxy where SNR > 3.0. Save the resulting SNR map to ~/AstroImages/snr_analysis/output/snr_map.fits. Record the background_mean, background_stddev, and snr_greater_than_3_area with their respective labels in a text file at ~/AstroImages/snr_analysis/output/snr_results.txt.
